headline: Should You Hold Equifax (EFX)?
summary: Jensen Investment Management, an asset management company based in the US, released its first-quarter 2025 investor letter for the “Jensen Quality Mid Cap Fund”. A copy of the letter is available to download here. The Jensen Quality Mid Cap Fund aims for long-term growth. The Fund returned -2.53% in Q1 2026, lagging the 0.60% return for […]

headline: Understanding the K-Shaped Economy: What It Means for Credit, Risk, and Consumers in 2026
summary: Highlights: Lenders must move beyond simple averages to account for the K-shaped divergence in consumer finances, differentiating between chronic revolving debt and one-time planned purchases....

headline: Class Action Over Credit File Errors Could Be A Game Changer For Equifax (EFX)
summary: In early May 2026, a class action was filed in Superior Court against Equifax and TransUnion seeking US$5,000 in compensatory and US$5,000 in punitive damages per affected consumer over alleged credit file inaccuracies dating back to May 2023. Beyond potential financial exposure, the case spotlights long-running concerns about error rates in credit reporting and how effectively major bureaus help consumers correct their files. We’ll now examine how the new class action and its focus on...
